title: pogostemon erectus var. gracilis
intro: Pogostemon erectus var. gracilis, also known as patchouli or Indonesian patchouli, is a perennial herb native to the tropical regions of Asia, particularly in Indonesia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of patchouli oil, derived from the plant, include reducing stress and anxiety, improving skin health, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. In herbal preparations, patchouli oil is often used in aromatherapy, skincare products, and traditional medicine to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
